name: Lemon Dressing for Fruit Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure out 1/3 cup of Lemonade or limeade.
2. Measure out 1/4 cup of Vegetable oil.
3. Measure out 1 tsp of Poppy seed.
4. Measure out 1/3 cup of Dry white wine.
5. Measure out 2 tbsp of Honey.
6. Combine all ingredients except fruit salad in a bowl.
7. Beat the mixture with a rotary beater until well combined.
8. Serve the dressing over your favorite fruit salad.
